name: Bug report
about: Report unexpected behaviour, a crash, or a regression in ClaudeLander.
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
  Thanks for filing a bug report.  Please fill in as much as you can.
  Sections marked REQUIRED block triage if left empty.
-->

## Summary (REQUIRED)

<!-- One or two sentences.  What did you observe that you did not expect? -->

## Reproduction steps (REQUIRED)

<!--
  Numbered steps starting from a clean checkout.  Include the build commands
  you ran, what you clicked / pressed, and where the bug surfaced.
-->

2.
3.

## Expected behaviour (REQUIRED)

<!-- What did you expect to happen? -->

## Actual behaviour (REQUIRED)

<!-- What happened instead?  Paste the error message verbatim if there is one. -->

## Environment (REQUIRED)

* OS and version (e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 22H2 + MSYS2):
* Compiler and version (`gcc --version`, `clang --version`, or MinGW-w64 build):
* CMake version (`cmake --version`):
* Generator (Ninja / Unix Makefiles):
* raylib backend (X11 native / Wayland / Windows OpenGL):
* Commit hash (`git rev-parse HEAD`):

## Logs / screenshots

<!--
  Attach ctest output, build logs, or short screen captures.  For crashes,
  include the stack trace if you have one.  Wrap long output in <details>
  tags to keep the issue readable.
-->

```
paste relevant log output here
```

## Additional context

<!--
  Anything else that might help: did this work before?  Does it reproduce
  on a different platform?  Is the bug deterministic or intermittent?
